full_text:
Zou Jing 鄒靖
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zou Jing (鄒靖). Served as Commandant under Liu Yan. Fought the Yellow Scarves with Liu Bei. Zou Jing was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Liu Yan.
